_comment: Main_6_train_evaluate_SimpleNN_full_profile.ipynb — PyTorch SimpleNN, full axial profile. Keys consumed: top-level test_size/random_state; runtime.* (read early, Section 2, before neural_network.*/tuning.* which are read in Section 3); neural_network.* (architecture + training); neural_network.tuning.* (Optuna Section 6b, only when IF_HYPERPARAM_TUNING=True); evaluation.* (physics-aware diagnostics, read in Section 3, used in Sections 9c/9d/10d/10e). See docs/ML_CONFIG_GUIDE.md.
_processed_stem_comment: Pins data/processed/features_targets_training_data_complete_<stem>.pkl (course default: the sample150 release dataset). Set to null for the newest features_targets_*.pkl.

runtime._comment: Read in Section 2 (Paths & Flags), ahead of the main config load, because thread pools must be configured before any data operations. subsample_max_rows: cap when SUBSAMPLE_ROWS=True. n_cpu_cores: null = use all logical CPUs. optuna_n_jobs: parallel Optuna trials in Section 6b (keep 1 on a single GPU).

neural_network._comment: h1-h3: hidden layer widths. Omitted keys use notebook fallbacks. Course defaults are sized for free Colab (epochs=150, n_trials=8); research-scale values were epochs=500, n_trials=15, epochs_per_trial=50, n_cpu_cores=10, optuna_n_jobs=10.

tuning._comment: Optuna (Section 6b) when IF_HYPERPARAM_TUNING=True. n_trials / epochs_per_trial / validation_fraction / timeout_seconds (null = no cap).

evaluation._comment: Physics-aware diagnostics read in Section 3. axial_stations: x/L fractions for the NRMSE station bars (9b overlays + 10e); nrmse_good_pct / nrmse_acceptable_pct: green / yellow acceptance bands on those bars; mc_dropout_samples: stochastic forward passes for the MC-Dropout uncertainty bands (9d); exit_station_tol: x/L tolerance used when isolating exit-plane rows for the joint panels (10d).
